references: The old woman will find you (sg.).

hypotheses: Alayulujba nguyunyu bungmanyani. → The old woman will find the old woman.
Janji darrangguwaji. → The dog ran (away) with the stick.
Ngirra nya alanga. → I stole the girl.
Daguma nyinga. → The old woman struck me.
Dirragbi ga balamurrungunya. → The old man will jump without a spear.
